verification.command: py -c "import game, inspect; assert callable(game.ask_question); assert all('interaktion' in p for p in game.PHASES); assert all(all(k in p['interaktion'] for k in ['typ','frage','optionen','richtig','feedback_richtig','feedback_falsch']) for p in game.PHASES); src = inspect.getsource(game.run_phase); assert 'ask_question' in src; assert 'score' in inspect.getsource(game.show_summary); print('T-001 OK')"
